mapper.select:
SELECT ss.id, ss.staff_id, ss.title, ss.description, ss.price, ss.unit, ss.status, ss.images, ss.create_time, ss.update_time,
si.NAME AS staffName, si.CODE AS staffCode, si.images AS staffImages FROM staff_skill ss LEFT JOIN staff_info si ON (si.id = ss.staff_id) WHERE 1 = 1
AND ss.title LIKE CONCAT('%',#{staffSkill.title},'%')
AND ss.status = #{staffSkill.status}
AND si.NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#{staffSkill.staffName},'%')
ORDER BY ss.create_time DESC

SELECT ss.id, ss.staff_id, ss.title, ss.description, ss.price, ss.unit, ss.status, ss.images, ss.create_time, ss.update_time,
si.NAME AS staffName, si.CODE AS staffCode, si.images AS staffImages FROM staff_skill ss LEFT JOIN staff_info si ON (si.id = ss.staff_id) WHERE 1 = 1 AND ss.title LIKE CONCAT('%',#{key},'%') ORDER BY ss.create_time DESC
